title: paspalum chilense
intro: Paspalum chilense, also known as Chilean grass or Paspalum, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Paspalum chilense can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal supplements and remedies.
